_comment: Author-assigned mapping from KMeans cluster ids (string keys) to the five urban activity types. After inspecting representative posts per cluster (sample images and t-SNE layout), the authors labelled clusters that reflect meaningful urban social activities. Clusters in drop_clusters were excluded for different reasons: cluster 1 is a cross-cutting residual partition whose posts overlap multiple activity-specific clusters in t-SNE and could not be reliably assigned to a single activity category (withheld to avoid misallocating activity support); cluster 4 predominantly contains text-dominant promotional or informational graphics lacking interpretable urban-activity imagery.
